title: Icy Silky Brazilian Rice Gratin
description: A fresh, silky rice dish with a light coconut base, aromatic turmeric and ginger, topped with creamy Epoisses and finished in a raclette grill for a crisp, al-dente finish. This Ayurvedic sattvic-friendly recipe blends Brazilian flavors with a modern twist.
instructions: Rinse the jasmine rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a medium pot, combine rinsed rice, water, coconut milk, turmeric, ginger, and a pinch of salt, then bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes until the liquid is absorbed and rice is tender.
Remove from heat and fluff the rice with a fork, then stir in lime juice, cilantro, mint, and julienned carrot.
Transfer the rice mixture to a raclette grill dish, spreading it evenly.
Sprinkle shredded Epoisses cheese over the rice and drizzle with olive oil.
Place the dish under the raclette grill's heat source until the cheese melts and forms a golden, slightly crisp top, about 3-4 minutes.
Serve hot, optionally garnishing with fresh mint leaves.
